caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt, a black baseball cap with a logo, and over-ear headphones sits in a studio setting. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone, looking slightly to his left and speaking. A white wall behind him features a repeating logo consisting of the word "HUSTLE" above three stars. To the right, a screen displays a red and white logo. Two identical overlays are present on the screen: a circular logo on the left that says "PODCAST" and a rectangular logo on the right that reads "BOSS TALK 101". The man remains in a consistent pose across the sequence, with his hand slightly raised toward his chest. The lighting and composition remain static, showing the man mid-conversation in a recording environment.
